expected_detections.name: Environment Fingerprinting

indicators: Security tool presence in PATH (strace, gdb, ida, frida)
Immediate exit when analysis environment detected

expected_detections.name: Persistence Installation
expected_detections.description: Underlying payload installs reverse shell backdoor in multiple persistence locations

notes: Comprehensive environment fingerprinting indicates sophisticated malware that actively evades security research environments.
